prompt: Explain why batch-1 LLM decode on a CPU is memory-bandwidth-bound rather than compute-bound, in three sentences.
A user has an old AVX-less server with lots of RAM. Recommend one concrete strategy to run a capable model quickly on it, and justify it in two sentences.
Write a short, clear docstring for a function that re-routes an optimizer to a kernel-bound or memory-bound action space based on roofline efficiency.
A train leaves city A at 9:00 traveling 60 km/h toward city B, 150 km away. A second train leaves B at 9:30 toward A at 90 km/h. At what time do they meet? Show your reasoning briefly.
Explain the difference between latency and throughput to a smart twelve-year-old, using one everyday analogy.
Write a Python function that returns the second-largest distinct value in a list, or None if there isn't one. Include a one-line explanation of an edge case you handled.
Summarize the trade-off between using a smaller model and a larger one on memory-constrained hardware, in no more than four sentences.
A colleague claims that quantizing a model to fewer bits always makes it run faster on any CPU. Briefly explain one situation where this is false and why.
Give clear step-by-step instructions for safely diagnosing why a Linux machine has become unresponsive over SSH, assuming you can still open one new SSH session.

Rewrite this sentence to be clearer and more concise without losing meaning: 'Due to the fact that the system was experiencing a high degree of memory pressure, the decision was made to reduce the size of the model that was being loaded.'
What is the capital of Australia, and why do many people incorrectly guess Sydney? Answer in two sentences.
Design a simple experiment to measure whether a code change actually improved a program's speed, and name two mistakes that would make the measurement untrustworthy.
Explain what a hash function is and one practical use for it, in plain language, in three sentences.
A recipe serves 4 and calls for 300 grams of flour and 2 eggs. You need to serve 10. List the adjusted quantities and show the scaling factor you used.
Argue briefly for the position that recording failed experiments is as valuable as recording successful ones, in three sentences.
